title: Configure the Voice (TTS) for Your Agent
lede: Choose the voice your Smart Agent speaks with. Pick a text-to-speech (TTS) provider, preview voices, filter by gender, accent, and age, and set a backup voice.

steps.title: Open the Voice (TTS) Panel
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open your agent.
  2. In the middle column, click the Voice (TTS) panel. Make sure its toggle is on.

images.caption: The Voice (TTS) panel sits in the middle column of the editor.
The Voice (TTS) panel sits in the middle column of the editor.

steps.title: Pick a Voice Provider
steps.content:
1. Use the provider tabs at the top of the panel to choose a provider. Available providers include iMash TTS, Cartesia, ElevenLabs, Rime, Playht, Deepgram, OpenAI, Azure, Resemble, MiniMax, and Google.
  2. Note that realtime (speech-to-speech) models come with their own built-in voices; when using one you pick from that model's voice set.

images.caption: The Voice panel: provider tabs, filters, a searchable voice list, and preview.
The Voice panel: provider tabs, filters, a searchable voice list, and preview.

steps.title: Filter, Preview, and Select a Voice
steps.content:
1. Narrow the list with the Gender, Accent, and Age filters.
  2. Click the play button next to a voice to hear a sample.
  3. When you find the one you want, tick its checkbox in the last column to make it the agent's voice.

steps.title: Tune the Voice and Set a Backup
steps.content:
• Some providers expose extra controls under Advanced Settings - for example ElevenLabs offers Stability, Clarity, Style Exaggeration, and Speed; Cartesia offers Emotion, Speed, and Volume.
  • You can also configure a Backup voice/provider that takes over automatically if the primary provider is unavailable.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: After picking a voice, keep tuning your agent:

cards.title: Choose the Brain (LLM)
cards.description: Understand realtime vs. text models and pick the LLM that powers replies.

cards.title: Agent Settings
cards.description: Adjust timeouts, idle messages, and voicemail handling.

cards.title: Test Your Agent
cards.description: Hear the voice live in the browser or over a phone call.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
